basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Library Trainee. Candidates with MLISc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Dharwad official website iitdh.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's in Library & Information Science (MLISc) with a minimum 65% or equivalent academic record.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
